items.badge_description: Porters and Stouts are rich with both history and flavor. Roasty, dark, and delicious, these two styles helped start it all. That’s 45 different beers with the style of Porter or Stout. Try 5 more for Level 10!

items.badge_description: We’re excited to unveil our annual badge in honor of International Women’s Day, shining a light on the amazing contributions of women and non-binary individuals within the craft beer scene and celebrating their creativity, passion, and dedication. Let’s raise our glasses to the pioneers who have forged a path for the next wave of female, femme-identifying, and non-binary brewers. Join the conversation on Instagram!

Want to enjoy a day of brews, but need to keep your wits sharp? There are plenty of delicious brews under 5% for you to sip on throughout the day. That's 255 different beers with an ABV of 5% and lower.

Canning is all the rage and it's not hard to see why - travels well, more environmentally friendly, and no need to carry your bottle opener. That's 235 checkins with the serving style of Can. Try 5 more for Level 48! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast

Porters and Stouts are rich with both history and flavor. Roasty, dark, and delicious, these two styles helped start it all. That’s 55 different beers with the style of Porter or Stout. Try 5 more for Level 12!
